eventLog:
Hunt pours everything they have into rebuilding the bar.
Used: 0 gold, 1 wood, 1 stone.
Rebuild progress added: 6.
Rebuild progress for bar: 28/100.
Hunt searches the forest and gathers 1 wood and 1 stone.
[EVENT — STREET] A town guard plants a spear in your path and demands to know what you’re up to.
The guards interpret the silence as guilt and grow even more suspicious.

Hunt pours everything they have into rebuilding the bar.
Used: 0 gold, 2 wood, 1 stone.
Rebuild progress added: 8.
Rebuild progress for bar: 22/100.
Hunt approaches the bar, but word has already reached Rowan. The door stays closed.
Hunt searches the forest and gathers 2 wood and 1 stone.

Hunt pours everything they have into rebuilding the bar.
Used: 0 gold, 1 wood, 0 stone.
Rebuild progress added: 2.
Rebuild progress for bar: 14/100.
Hunt approaches the bar, but word has already reached Rowan. The door stays closed.
Hunt takes in the village mood: The villagers are already gossiping about the damage at the bar. Apparently no one agrees on who was most to blame.
Hunt approaches the bar, but word has already reached Rowan. The door stays closed.
[EVENT — VILLAGE] The villagers are already gossiping about the damage at the bar. Apparently no one agrees on who was most to blame.
[EVENT — STREET] A town guard plants a spear in your path and demands to know what you’re up to.
Hunt wants to rebuild the bar, but they are too far away. Move adjacent to the bar first.
Hunt searches the forest and gathers 1 wood.
The guards interpret the silence as guilt and grow even more suspicious.

Hunt pours everything they have into rebuilding the bar.
Used: 0 gold, 4 wood, 1 stone.
Rebuild progress added: 12.
Rebuild progress for bar: 12/100.
The Dungeon Master does not understand Hunt's action yet.
The Dungeon Master does not understand Hunt's action yet.

recentHistory:

Rebuild progress added: 2.
Rebuild progress for bar: 14/100.
Hunt attempts: "rebuild bar"
Hunt approaches the bar, but word has already reached Rowan. The door stays closed.
Hunt arrives at the bar, but it has been destroyed. Only charred remains stand.
The old bar is gone. The only options now are to clear the ruins or rebuild something new.
The bar collapses into ruins. The old bar is gone.
Hunt reacts awkwardly, but the fight only grows louder.
The bar takes 15 damage. HP: 15/100. Status: critical.
Hunt reacts awkwardly, but the fight only grows louder.
The bar takes 15 damage. HP: 30/100. Status: critical.
Hunt reacts awkwardly, but the fight only grows louder.
The bar takes 15 damage. HP: 45/100. Status: damaged.
[EVENT — BAR] The argument explodes. A stool flips, someone swings, and the whole room jolts into chaos.
